blockers.detail: Linux x64 Docker SannySoft, BrowserLeaks, Pixelscan, BrowserScan, iphey, and CreepJS smokes now exist in both headless and headed/Xvfb display modes where supported. macOS arm64 packaged headed SannySoft full direct evidence plus packaged BrowserLeaks Client Hints/Screen/Canvas/WebGL/audio/fonts/WebRTC, BrowserScan client-hints/audio/fonts/canvas/storage/permissions/automation, BrowserScan WebGL, Pixelscan WebGL/audio/fonts/canvas, iphey client-hints/audio/fonts/canvas/locale/permissions/automation, and CreepJS WebGL/audio/fonts evidence exists for the built BrowseForge Chromium app; older host headed BrowserLeaks direct evidence exists through installed system Chrome. Windows and external proxy detector matrix coverage remain absent.

Packaged Linux BrowserLeaks Client Hints smoke executed with Chromium configured for --proxy-server=<loopback-http-proxy>; the committed local CONNECT proxy observer summary recorded BrowserLeaks HTTPS tunnel traffic through the proxy. BrowserLeaks WebRTC collection now flags sanitized candidate IP literal counts. scripts/detector_harness.py proxy-preflight now fails closed unless an external proxy URL and redacted region label are present and rejects loopback/private/local proxy authorities without emitting credentials or raw IP literals. Native persona validation now rejects raw IP, URL/credential-like, whitespace-padded, and overlong WebRTC proxy_region labels in Go and C++ coherence paths. No external proxy exit-IP/geolocation detector run has been executed.

Release-grade headed/proxy BrowserLeaks/Pixelscan/iphey/BrowserScan/CreepJS/SannySoft matrix remains required; detector-score-comparison.json records CreepJS audio headless/headed deltas and BrowserLeaks/CreepJS font glyph/metric comparison while keeping release_grade=false and explicit baseline_gaps for missing BrowserLeaks audio, Pixelscan audio/fonts, and native headed font corpus evidence.
